name: Red Any% Runner
title: Speedrunner — Emulator Channel Twin
flavor_text: Any% to the Hall of Fame. Every frame is a road; every menu is a shortcut.

abilities.name: Route
abilities.text: Lay the optimal path start-to-credits: which fights to take, which to walk past.

abilities.name: Grind-skip
abilities.text: Skip every avoidable battle; carry just enough levels to clear the next wall.

abilities.name: RNG-manip
abilities.text: Steer the pseudo-random seed with timed inputs to force the outcome you need.

abilities.name: Menu-buffer
abilities.text: Pre-load menu inputs a frame early so the next action fires the instant it's legal.
